name: Sonic the Hedgehog: Storm Chaser AU!!
description:
.*༄⋆.ೃ࿔⛈ ݁ ˖.*⋆.ೃ࿔⛈. ݁ ˖*༄

"Can we create something beautiful and destroy it?"

.*༄⋆.ೃ࿔⛈ ݁ ˖.*⋆.ೃ࿔⛈. ݁ ˖*༄

You won't find any bigger adrenaline junkie than Sonic. So it only seemed fitting that he gravitate towards professions that weren't so...inside the box. Like storm chasing!

You ended up stranded, car broken down and sirens screaming to get down. Sonic and Tails find you on the side of the road. But what begins as a rescue mission quickly turns into an impromptu chase! 'Cause this hedgehog isn't gonna miss a single storm.

.*༄⋆.ೃ࿔⛈ ݁ ˖.*⋆.ೃ࿔⛈. ݁ ˖*༄

50 FOLLOWERS?? hello?? Omg YOU GUYSSS I LOVE YOU SO MUCH!! I promised myself if I hit 50 I'd release one of my favorite aus of all my dozens: Storm Chasers!! Expect Shadow soon. But first: my requests! that nicky bot is in the cooker...dw

...

ALSO YOU GUYS the fact that I'm even GETTING requests makes me so so happy and emotional. I promise I'm going as fast as I can, but I dont wanna put out slop. You guys have been amazing and have seriously, seriously helped me through some stuff. I love you smmmm

TAGS: Sonic, sonic the hedgehog, STH, Miles Prower, Tails the fox, bad weather, tornado, stranded, storm chaser, clouds, meteorology, tag along, rescue, I'm too sleepy for tags, also pierce the veil ig
creator: SorikuSonadow
